title: Dinosaur Toys for Boys, Fossil Digging Kit for Kids Dinosaur Egg Toys 3-10 Year Old Boy Gifts Boys Toy Age 3-8 Toy Figure Gifts for 3-11 Year Old
features: 【Dinosaur Egg Dig Kit】12 Dinosaur eggs individually packaged, each with a digging tool. Also included are 12 dinosaur learning cards labelled with dinosaur information. Our play mat measures 60*40 cm and is made of double-layered, non-slip, non-woven fabric for a comfortable play experience.

【Learning Toy Set】Experience the excitement of discovery like a real paleontologist as you dig up 12 unique dinosaur fossils! The whole excavation process is a process to simulate archaeology, which is a good way to train the child's operating and observing skills as well as the related historical knowledge of dinosaurs.

【Dino Excavation Set】To avoid mess caused by excavation, place the old newspaper or paper towel on the workstation before starting. Then soak the Dino eggs in water for a while to facilitate digging, and use the digging tools to get the unique Dino. Slowly sweep off the dust with the brush. Rinse with clean water, you will get the Dino you want!
【Dig and Play】When the children have successfully acquired all the dinosaurs, they can use our play mat for a new play experience. Let's go on an adventure together with dinosaurs.
【Gift】This dinosaur digging set is perfect for parties with dinosaurs, birthdays, classroom activities, indoor and outdoor activities and also makes a great gift.
